text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're still running, McQueen? I thought you
were already done with training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, well... I may have overindulged during lunch,
so I thought it best to exercise a bit more to—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Goodness! There's such a thing as tact, you know!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wait, lemme get this straight. You're satisfied
with a boring old diet?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A boring old diet? Are you meaning to imply that
there exists another kind of diet?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, of course! It's called "Golshi's Patented
Slimming Technique"!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The name doesn't quite inspire confidence... Is it
truly an effective technique?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, for sure! Not that I've tested it out before!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then that's no more than false advertising! Now
please leave me be so I can continue my run!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now hang on! I can prove it works! C'mon, let's
work together and spread my technique around
the world!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I said no. Now if you'll excuse me, I'm busy
conditioning myself the old-fashioned way!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aw, humor me a little! The first step's easy! All
you gotta do is shout "Begone, flab!" while
running!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: H-hush! Don't yell that so loudly!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No can do! Some dreams only come true if you
say them out loud!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Stop this instant! There's some things that never
need to be said aloud!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later, Gold Ship is noticeably leaner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Golshi's Patented Slimming
Technique hasn't caught on at all.
